use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CYCLIC HEAVY MENSTRUAL BLEEDING

indications.text:
LYSTEDA™ (tranexamic acid) Tablets is indicated for the treatment of cyclic heavy menstrual bleeding
[see Clinical Studies (14)].
Prior to prescribing LYSTEDA, exclude endometrial pathology that can be associated with heavy
menstrual bleeding.

LYSTEDA™ (tranexamic acid) tablets is indicated for the treatment of cyclic heavy menstrual bleeding
[see Clinical Studies (14)].
Prior to prescribing LYSTEDA, exclude endometrial pathology that can be associated with heavy
menstrual bleeding.

LYSTEDA® is indicated for the treatment of cyclic heavy menstrual bleeding in females of reproductive
potential [see Clinical Studies (14)].

LYSTEDA® (tranexamic acid) Tablets is indicated for the treatment of cyclic heavy menstrual bleeding
[see Clinical Studies (14)].
Prior to prescribing LYSTEDA, exclude endometrial pathology that can be associated with heavy
menstrual bleeding.

LYSTEDATM (tranexamic acid) tablets is indicated for the treatment of cyclic heavy menstrual bleeding
[see Clinical Studies (14)].
Prior to prescribing LYSTEDA, exclude endometrial pathology that can be associated with heavy
menstrual bleeding.
